nodes.name: .goreleaser.yaml
nodes.summary: GoReleaser configuration for building and publishing the datagen tool binary, specifying build targets, checksum, snapshot, and changelog settings.

nodes.name: go.mod
nodes.summary: Go module definition for the datagen tool, declaring the module path and direct/indirect dependencies used by the integration test data generator.

nodes.name: go.sum
nodes.summary: Go dependency checksum file providing cryptographic hashes for all direct and transitive dependencies of the datagen module to ensure reproducible builds.
nodes.languageNotes: go.sum is auto-generated and acts as a lockfile for Go modules; it should not be manually edited.
